Index injuries. Build stronger VA claims.

Body
Pin Key: Single (Unilateral) Bilateral (Both Sides)
Quick Select
Log Injury
Fill in the details below.
Override the condition name shown on the pin (optional).
Import from CSV
Upload a spreadsheet to bulk-import injuries.
Use this template for the correct column format.
Injury History
Your injury history in order. Each entry shows the date, location, and details you provided. Items need a date to appear here. Go to the Primary Map tab to add or edit injuries.
Claim Map — Severity & Secondary
Rate how bad each condition is and add any secondary issues it has caused. Click "Rate" to answer questions about your condition. Under each claim, use "Add Secondary" to list problems caused by that condition (for example: a knee injury that caused back pain, or PTSD that caused insomnia). Secondary conditions can increase your overall rating.
War-Related & Special Claims
Add claims related to your job, combat service, or special circumstances. This includes things like combat-related conditions, Military Sexual Trauma (MST), Agent Orange exposure, burn pit exposure, and Gulf War illness. These claims have special rules that can help your case.
VA Rating Calculator
Your estimated combined VA disability rating based on all conditions you've entered. The VA uses "VA Math" — each rating is applied to the remaining healthy percentage, not simply added together. Conditions affecting both sides of your body (left and right knee, for example) get a 10% bilateral bonus. This is an estimate only — your actual rating may differ.
Notes & Statement
Use this space however works for you — a VA personal statement, notes from doctor visits, questions for your VSO, reminders, or context about specific conditions. Write for whoever reads this next (VSO, attorney, family, or yourself later). Your logged conditions are listed on the right for easy reference — click one to drop its name into your notes.
Documentation & organization tool — not a VA decision engine. Not an official VA product. Not affiliated with or endorsed by the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs. This app helps you organize your injury records and prepare for the claims process. It does not file claims, make official decisions, or guarantee any rating or outcome. Ratings shown are estimates based on general VA criteria. No data is stored — export before closing. Talk to a VSO, VA-accredited claims agent, or disability attorney before filing.
